# ToolRate – Complete Multi-Language Overview

ToolRate is a crowdsourced reliability layer for autonomous AI agents. It gives agents a real-time reliability score, common pitfalls, mitigations, and better alternatives *before* they call any external tool or API.

This helps agents move from fragile demos to reliable production systems and significantly reduces token waste.

## All Available Translations

- English: /llms/overview-en.md
- Deutsch: /llms/overview-de.md
- Français: /llms/overview-fr.md
- Nederlands: /llms/overview-nl.md
- Español: /llms/overview-es.md
- Italiano: /llms/overview-it.md
- Polski: /llms/overview-pl.md
- Русский: /llms/overview-ru.md
- Українська: /llms/overview-uk.md
- 中文: /llms/overview-zh.md
- 日本語: /llms/overview-ja.md
- 한국어: /llms/overview-ko.md
- العربية: /llms/overview-ar.md
- हिन्दी: /llms/overview-hi.md
- Português (Brasil): /llms/overview-pt-br.md
- Türkçe: /llms/overview-tr.md
- Tiếng Việt: /llms/overview-vi.md
- ไทย: /llms/overview-th.md

- Čeština: /llms/overview-cs.md

- Română: /llms/overview-ro.md
- Ελληνικά: /llms/overview-el.md
- Hausa: /llms/overview-ha.md
- Yorùbá: /llms/overview-yo.md
- Kiswahili: /llms/overview-sw.md
- বাংলা: /llms/overview-bn.md

- मराठी: /llms/overview-mr.md
- اُردُو: /llms/overview-ur.md
- فارسی: /llms/overview-fa.md

ToolRate is source-available under BUSL-1.1 and is designed especially for production agent builders who want fewer failed tool calls and better reliability.

Website: https://toolrate.ai
API: https://api.toolrate.ai

Last updated: April 2026
